evidence_label: case-001 T-BDMC material identity gate, not medical advice

source_checks.source_role: Resolved T-BDMC structure as CID 10447050 with formula C19H16O3 and InChIKey PALMCMYYFAHUGA-BPTNNVFMSA-N.
Resolved the same InChIKey and formula as CHEMBL469419; ChEMBL does not mark it as an approved or therapeutic compound.
Recovered KB IC50 5750 nM, Vero IC50 9650 nM, and selectivity index 1.68 from ChEMBL3286273, keeping cytotoxicity and safety-window gates mandatory.
Focused T-BDMC or trienone-curcuminoid plus HbF/thalassemia search still recovered Nuamsee 2021 as the direct HbF-thalassemia source.
Synthesis and cytotoxicity source for trienone analogues of curcuminoids.

material_requirements_before_quote: supplier or synthesis partner names exact T-BDMC, PubChem CID 10447050, ChEMBL469419, or the matching InChIKey
certificate of analysis or equivalent batch record includes identity, purity, lot, method, vehicle or solvent, and storage conditions
no substitution with turmeric, curcumin, BDMC, generic curcuminoids, HHBDMC, T-Cur, T-DMC, or unnamed T-BDMC-like material
qualified lab accepts mature red-cell hemolysis plus erythroid viability and maturation as mandatory safety-window readouts
decision_rule: T-BDMC exact database identity is resolved, but the quote state remains hold until procurement identity, batch purity, vehicle, storage, and hemolysis/viability safety-window requirements are explicit.
